| component.mobile | upload-paragraph-color-text | {color.text.subtle} |
| component.mobile | iconbox-color-icon | {color.icon.subtle} |
| component.mobile | badge-color-neutral-inverse-bg | {color.bg.inverse.subtle} |

pokerstars.dark
----------------

| context | token | reference |
| --- | --- | --- |
| component.mobile | badgeDefault-color-Black-bg | {color.bg.inverse} |
| component.mobile | listingItem-paragraph-color-text-subtle | {color.text.subtle} |
| component.mobile | radio-supportingText-color-text-default | {color.text.subtle} |
| component.mobile | inputText-color-icon-default | {color.icon.subtle} |
